<!-- Thanks for contributing to AirAtlas! Keep PRs focused on one thing. -->

**What does this change, and why?**


**Related issue**
<!-- e.g. Closes #7 -->

**Checks** (CI runs these automatically; please run them locally too)
- [ ] `ruff check pipeline` passes
- [ ] `cd pipeline && pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build` passes (type-check + bundle)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behaviour changes
- [ ] If this changes what data is shown or how, the About page / `SOURCES.md` is updated to explain it
